title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for prompting Claude Code effectively, derived from studying how Anthropic engineers work: prompt skills rather than Claude directly, treat skills as composable units beyond simple prompts, build reusable skills instead of custom ones, and structure prompts to improve over time through sessions.
